text: 2460 > Q (= I Gl corman ohacy 2o S0m o G R GEELER TR £ G oy 3 B R CG il P8 gl B KRS 520 I AT 2l AT - 5 260 & 2% Bz 2. o7 2Ll M e Suis The women who are past their youth (and can no longer bear children) and do not look forward to marriage " will incur no sin if they cast off their outer garments without displaying their adornment. But if they remain modest, that s still better for them. Allah s All-Hearing, All-Knowing.
